chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 168 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. 10.01.2018. Mr. Tarique Ali Narai, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant A.G. Syed Meeral Shah, A.P.G. for the State. = Through this petition, the main grievance of the petitioner is that respondents No.3 and 4 at the behest of respondent No.5 are harassing the petitioner without any justification. Learned A.A.G. and A.P.G. present in court submit that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the statement/undertaking given by them. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to facsimile the copy of this order to SSP Hyderabad and SSP Dadu for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
